headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on NRG Energy, Raises Price Target to $209
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Shahriar Pourreza   maintains NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $203 to $209.
